talks.title: Humans, AI, and the New Dev Workflow
talks.description: Keynote on human–AI collaboration in modern DevSecOps workflows and what it means for developer experience.

talks.title: Designing Programs for the Agentic Era
talks.description: Shared frameworks for running education cohorts and workshop series that help developers adopt AI responsibly.

speakerInfo.bio: Fatima Sarah Khalid is a Developer Advocate at GitLab and Research Fellow at Newspeak House. She focuses on AI and developer experience, open source communities, and the intersection of technology and governance.

rider.travel: Will travel internationally. Prefer direct flights when possible.
rider.accommodation: Hotel room for night before and night of event.
rider.av: HDMI connection, lapel mic preferred, confidence monitor helpful.
rider.accessibility: Please provide accessibility info for venue in advance.
rider.other: Happy to do meet-and-greets or workshops. Need 24hr notice for slides review.
